_comment: AgentVault hooks snippet — generated by `av init --agent claude-code`.
THIS IS A TEMPLATE TO MERGE, NOT AN AUTHORITATIVE SCHEMA. The exact Claude Code
hook configuration shape varies by version. Merge the `hooks` block below into
your Claude Code settings (e.g. .claude/settings.json) and adjust the matcher /
event names to match YOUR installed version. Verify with: claude --version and
SCRUB-COVERAGE CONTRACT (the whole point of the adapter): the goal is NOT 'hook
stdout' — it is to intercept EVERY channel that carries external text into the
agent's context. Enumerate each channel and run av-scrub.sh on it. Channels:
- MCP tool output (every MCP server's tool results)
- any future tool whose result is shown to the model
A channel left unhooked is a hole through which an unredacted secret can reach
the model. av run already masks its own child output at the source (layer 1);
this hook is the independent layer-2 net for everything else.
